faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: Do I get the full source code?
faq.a1: Yes, 100% complete. After a successful purchase, you will immediately get access to download the ZIP file containing all raw source code (Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS), database schema, and design assets without any restrictions.
faq.q2: Can I use these templates for client projects?
faq.a2: Absolutely. Our standard license permits you to use the templates to build commercial projects for yourself as well as for your clients.
faq.a3: Yes. Every template includes comprehensive local setup instructions. This includes packages installation steps, setting up environmental variables (.env), database migrations, and deployment guides.
faq.a4: Yes. Every license purchase includes lifetime free updates. Any new version (including bug fixes or framework upgrades) will be automatically available for download in your dashboard.
faq.a5: Yes. We offer 6 months of basic technical support to assist you with installation issues, setup configurations, or general questions about using the templates.
faq.q6: How do I download the product after purchasing?
faq.a6: The process is instant. As soon as your simulated sandbox payment is verified, your unique license key is generated, and the ZIP (and APK, if available) download buttons become active on both the product page and your account dashboard.

testimonials.title: Developer Community Support
testimonials.t1: Newlera Stack cut our POS dashboard build time by 60%. The Tailwind v4 and Prisma configuration inside is very clean and production-ready. Highly recommended!
testimonials.t2: The IoT dashboard template is highly responsive and the APK is instantly ready to test on our industrial monitors. The aesthetics are luxurious, not your average template design.
testimonials.t3: The JWT auth and user profile modules are very easy to modify. The live demo is highly accurate and the code documentation is well structured.

cta.title: Ready to Launch Your Business Project?
cta.desc: Get instant access to all premium web & mobile APK templates. Start building modern dashboards, CRM, POS, and landing pages without limits.
